files.patch:
@@ -178,5 +178,5 @@ - *

Normalization is the process of removing unnecessary {@code "."}, - * {@code ".."}, and {@code "//"} (empty) segments from the path component of a - * hierarchical URI. Each {@code "."} and empty segment is simply removed. A - * {@code ".."} segment is removed only if it is preceded by a non-{@code ".."} - * segment. Normalization has no effect upon opaque URIs. + *

Normalization is the process of removing unnecessary {@code "."} + * and {@code ".."} segments, and redundant {@code "/"} (empty segments) from + * the path component of a hierarchical URI. Each {@code "."} and empty segment + * is simply removed. A {@code ".."} segment is removed only if it is preceded + * by a non-{@code ".."} segment. Normalization has no effect upon opaque URIs. @@ -1033,1 +1033,1 @@ - *

  • All {@code "//"} empty segments are removed. + *

  • All redundant {@code "/"} (empty segments) are removed.
